posts.title: TODAY: Look at the wording on the Virginia ballot: "adopt new congressional districts to restore fairness"

twitter.content:
How do you rig an election? You rig the question. Look at this ballot asking Virginians to flip a 6D-5R congressional map to 10D-1R, breaking up every region of the Commonwealth. Yet the ballot says “to restore fairness.” Rigged.
VOTE NO.

posts.author: ArthurJ
posts.title: SCOTUS declines to hear challenge to school gender identity policy that allows students to adopt new names and pronouns without parental notification.

link_metadata.description: The Supreme Court of the United States (SCOTUS) declined to review a challenge to a Massachusetts school district’s policy that allows students to adopt new names and pronouns without parental notification.
link_metadata.title: SCOTUS declines to hear challenge to school gender identity policy

posts.author: KuzoKevin
posts.title: I will patronize any establishment that has this sign on their door.

twitter.content: You need valid ID to enter our bar. This isn’t a voting booth.

posts.author: Belleoffreedom
posts.title: Toss Thune

twitter.content:
The SAVE America Act is officially dead in the Senate. The Republican GOP no longer has any interest in passing Voter ID

Leader John Thune says they have more important issues to focus on

If we don’t have representation, then why are any of us paying taxes?? We need a new Party
